strategy_summary: The binary is a 32-bit ELF with NX enabled and no PIE. The vulnerability is a stack overflow in the vulnerable_function, which reads 256 bytes into a 136-byte buffer. We can use this to overwrite the return address on the stack. Since we have the system function in the PLT and GOT, we can perform a ret2libc attack. We will need to measure the offset to the return address and find gadgets to set up the arguments for system.
